originalTitle: Fixing Reinforcement Learning Infrastructure: Adding continuous control
title: Implementing Continuous Control in PufferLib and Debugging Car Racing Environment
summary: Worked on two major tasks: provided feedback to the wandb team on integrating carbs hyperparameter tuning into wandb sweeps, and implemented continuous control support in PufferLib. This involved adding a box2d wrapper, modifying the policy network and training loop for continuous actions, and creating a simple continuous control test environment. Debugged issues with car racing and mountain car environments.
